catalog_content:
Item Name: Durkee Mesquite Herb Fajita Seasoning - 22 oz. container, 6 per case
Product Description: Durkee Mesquite Herb Fajita Seasoning - 22 oz. container, 6 per case A warm, spicy blend of chili peppers, garlic, onion, thyme, black pepper, hickory smoke flavor and salt. This product is orangish-red in color and similar in size to seasoning salt. This product contains no MSG. Since this product blends spices and herbs with mesquite flavor, it provides an easy way to add entree alternatives to your menu. Use in making chicken or beef fajitas. Use as a sprinkle on, rub ormarinade for chicken, steaks, turkey tenderloins and pork. Great for a signature Southwestern Style Hamburger. Sprinkle on or use as a rub for meats. For quick & tasty fajitas, mix 1 pound beef or chicken with 2 tablespoons seasoning and 1/4 cup cooking oil; marinate for at least 1 hour. Cook meat over high heat or on a grill, slice into strips and serve with warm tortillas. Add your choice of salsa, onions, sour cream, tomatoes & lettuce.
Value: 6.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Mid-tier branded seasoning from a well-known manufacturer, positioned as a flavorful, ready-to-use blend for Southwestern cuisine. The 22 oz container size and multipack option (6 per case) suggest cost efficiency for bulk buyers, though no premium or organic claims are visible. Packaging is functional but lacks luxury cues, targeting home cooks and restaurant suppliers seeking convenience without high-end pricing.

Prepare to embark on a flavor journey like no other as you uncover the captivating depths of this truly versatile rub. Our Sweet ‘n Zesty Chicken Rub is an ideal companion for chicken but also for beef, enhancing the natural richness of the meat and infusing it with a hint of tantalizing sweetness. Unleash your creativity and experiment with new combinations. Sprinkle a dash of this captivating rub on your roasted potatoes, giving them a delectable twist. Create mouthwatering burgers that burst with flavor, or add a sprinkle to your homemade sauces and marinades for an extra touch of magic. Smoke’n Magic’s Sweet ‘n Zesty Chicken Rub seasoning will elevate your BBQ gatherings and leave a lasting impression on your guests.
